base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of ghost_pen_gate — a tile from 1980 pac man. Pink horizontal bar at top of ghost-pen — allows only ghosts to pass through (not Pac-Man). Persistent static tile. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Pink horizontal bar at top of ghost-pen — allows only ghosts to pass through (not Pac-Man). Persistent static tile
